overview.name: HTTP Variables
overview.description:
This scenario verifies HTTP request execution using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for comments, endpoints, headers, condition, request body values and expected values. 2. Send POST request using variables in comment, endpoint, condition and raw request body. 3. Verify response status = 201 using expected file with injected variables. 4. Send second POST request using body file with injected variables. 5. Verify second entity creation using expected file with injected variables. 6. Send request with variable-based request and response headers. 7. Verify response status, body and headers. 8. Reset in-memory storage using variable-based endpoint.
This scenario validates: - Variable injection into comment - Variable injection into condition - Variable injection into HTTP endpoints - Variable injection into raw request body - Variable injection into request body file content - Variable injection into expected file content - Variable injection into request headers - Variable injection into response headers - Variable reuse across HTTP steps

var.comment: Create variable for condition
var.name: varShouldExecute

var.comment: Create variable for create endpoint
var.name: createEndpoint

var.comment: Create variable for headers endpoint
var.name: headersEndpoint

var.comment: Create variable for reset endpoint
var.name: resetEndpoint

var.comment: Create variable for first step comment
var.name: createComment

constant.value: Step 1-3. Create entity using variables in comment, endpoint and raw body

var.comment: Create variable for second step comment
var.name: createFromFileComment

constant.value: Step 4-5. Create second entity using variables in body file

var.comment: Create variable for headers step comment
var.name: headersComment

constant.value: Step 6-7. Validate variable injection into request and response headers

var.comment: Create variable for reset comment
var.name: resetComment

constant.value: Step 8. Reset entity storage using variable-based endpoint

var.comment: Create variable for first entity name
var.name: entityName

var.comment: Create variable for first entity description
var.name: entityDescription

var.comment: Create variable for first entity status
var.name: entityStatus

var.comment: Create variable for first entity category
var.name: entityCategory

var.comment: Create variable for second entity name
var.name: fileEntityName

var.comment: Create variable for second entity description
var.name: fileEntityDescription

var.comment: Create variable for second entity status
var.name: fileEntityStatus

var.comment: Create variable for second entity category
var.name: fileEntityCategory

var.comment: Create variable for request header name
var.name: requestHeaderName

var.comment: Create variable for request header value
var.name: requestHeaderValue

var.comment: Create variable for response header name
var.name: responseHeaderName

var.comment: Create variable for response header value
var.name: responseHeaderValue

var.comment: Create variable for header response
var.name: headerResponse

var.comment: Create variable for request body file
var.name: bodyFile
